About Organization

The Rajasthan High Court is the highest court in the Indian state of Rajasthan. It was established on 29 August 1949.

The Rajasthan High Court has its principal seat in Jodhpur and a bench in Jaipur.

About the Programme

The Rajasthan High Court Stenographer Recruitment 2026 is a government job opportunity for Indian citizens.

The programme aims to recruit eligible candidates for the post of Stenographer in the Rajasthan High Court.
